title: Quirks
description: Adds silly gadgets for lots of fun
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vBKDAnceNt8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# About

**Quirks** adds a collection of fun gadgets and blocks that you can use for building, mobility, and etc.

Made for **survival** and **creative**, have fun and use the available gadgets to your advantage!

# Mod

The mod currently only supports **1.21.1 NeoForge** but may support newer versions eventually, and **1.20.1 Forge** for older versions.

Available in **English** and **Français (France)**.



<details>
<summary>Blocks</summary>

* **Jump Pad**
* **Speed Pad**
* **Teleport Pad**
* **Conveyor**
* **Zipline**

</details>





<details>
<summary>Items</summary>

* **Knockback Glint**
* **Grappling Hook**
* **Magic Wand**
* **Flamethrower**
* **Waterjet**
* **Iceball**
* **Measuring Tape**
* **Quiver**

</details>




<details>
<summary>Multi-use</summary>

* **Directional Fan**

</details>


<details>
<summary>Gamerules</summary>

* **flameGriefing** <true/false> [true]

</details>





### and more to come!
